CONTENT.Club career: Born in Paris, Youssouf began his career in 2005 with Le Havre.In July 2015, after his contract with Ergotelis expired, Youssouf signed a two-year contract deal with Veria until 30 June 2017. He debuted for the club on 23 August 2015 against PAS Giannina.On 8 January 2017, Youssouf signed for Super League Greece club Levadiakos for an undisclosed fee.

CONTENT.Career statistics: Scores and results list Comoros goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Youssouf goal.
CONTENT.International career: Youssouf was selected for the Comoros national team at the 2021 Africa Cup of Nations.

SUMMARY: Mohamed Youssouf (born 26 March 1988) is a  professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Ligue 2 club Ajaccio. Born in France, he plays for the Comoros national team.
